title: Better Arrows
description: Better Arrows adds arrow ricochet off blocks and a mechanic for recovering arrows after firing, making archery combat more dynamic and strategic without straying from the vanilla experience.
body:
# ⚠️ BETA - Better Arrows

> This mod is in **beta** version.

> This means it may contain bugs, unstable behavior, and frequent changes in mechanics.

---

# 🏹 Better Arrows

A mod that improves the bow experience in Minecraft, adding arrow recovery mechanics and dynamic ricochet off blocks.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🏹 Arrow Recovery
Arrows fired can be recovered after defeating enemies, increasing the bow's utility and reducing ammunition waste.

### 🔄 Arrow Ricochet
Depending on the block hit, arrows can bounce and change their trajectory, creating unique combat and exploration situations.

### 🎯 Special Interactions
- Bells can be activated when hit by arrows
- Certain blocks alter ricochet behavior
- Mobs like slimes influence arrow impact

---

## ⚙️ Compatibility
- Minecraft: 1.21.1 (adjustable depending on build)
- NeoForge
- Compatible with other combat and projectile physics mods

---

## 💡 Mod Idea
To improve bow combat, making arrows more interactive, reusable, and dynamic within the world.

---

## 🧪 Notes
- Arrows in creative mode are not recoverable
- Some effects depend on the type of block hit
- Mechanics may change in future (beta) versions
